sentences.arabic: يَقْضِي كَثِيرٌ مِنَ النَّاسِ وَقْتًا طَوِيلًا فِي مَوَاقِعِ التَّوَاصُلِ الِاجْتِمَاعِيِّ كُلَّ يَوْمٍ.
sentences.translation: Mnogi ljudi svakodnevno provode mnogo vremena na društvenim mrežama.
sentences.translationEn: Many people spend a long time on social media sites every day.

sentences.arabic: مِنَ الْمُهِمِّ تَقْلِيلُ وَقْتِ الشَّاشَةِ لِلْحِفَاظِ عَلَى الصِّحَّةِ الْبَدَنِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Važno je smanjiti vrijeme provedeno ispred ekrana radi očuvanja fizičkog zdravlja.
sentences.translationEn: It is important to reduce screen time to maintain physical health.

sentences.arabic: يَجِبُ أَنْ نَتَحَدَّثَ مَعَ أَصْدِقَائِنَا فِي الْعَالَمِ الْحَقِيقِيِّ بِشَكْلٍ أَكْثَرَ.
sentences.translation: Trebali bismo češće razgovarati sa svojim prijateljima u stvarnom svijetu.
sentences.translationEn: We should talk to our friends in the real world more often.
